name: G-4 migrate-rubric: --dry-run reports the rules→files plan to stderr and does not archive the original RUBRIC.yaml
command:
mkdir -p root/rubric && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-google-001
    provenance:
      - source: google-tsguide
' > root/rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD/root" --emit-tree "$PWD/out" --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -f root/rubric/RUBRIC.yaml ] && [ ! -f root/rubric/RUBRIC.legacy.yaml.archived ] && grep -q 'rules -> ' err.txt && echo planned 1>&2
